mapper.insert:
insert into patsaas.fr_json_file(file_url, code, msg, status, times, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.fileUrl}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.msg}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.times}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into patsaas.fr_json_file(file_url, code, msg, status, times, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.fileUrl}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.msg}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.times}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update file_url = values(file_url) , code = values(code) , msg = values(msg) , status = values(status) , times = values(times) , start_time = values(start_time) , end_time = values(end_time) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time)
